allow: Bash(mysql -uroot -pbomc705 -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS qa_service DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci;")

Bash(powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/admin.html' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/admin.html' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/admin.js' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/admin.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/user.html' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/user.html' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/user.js' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/user.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/styles.css' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/styles.css' -Force; Write-Host 'Files copied successfully'")

Bash(powershell -Command "Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/user.js' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/user.js' -Force; Copy-Item -Path 'D:/QA/newfront/admin.js' -Destination 'D:/QA/front/admin.js' -Force; Write-Host 'JS files copied successfully'")
